# Distributed Eq. (26) 2x2 MPS Benchmark

## Setup
- Global system: `6` qubits.
- Local qubits per agent: `5`.
- Spectrum source: `sparse_eigsh`.
- Scaled spectrum check: `lambda_min=0.05`, `lambda_max=1`.
- Row Laplacian: `[[0.5, -0.5], [-0.5, 0.5]]`.
- Column consensus weights: `[[0.5, 0.5], [0.5, 0.5]]`.

## Timings
- Forward global cost mean: `0.125064 s`.
- Reverse-mode global gradient mean: `10.929179 s`.
- One distributed iteration mean: `17.082422 s`.

## One Iteration Diagnostics
- Current global cost: `1.1930905334`.
- Alpha gradient L2 norm: `1.08376472258`.
- Beta gradient L2 norm: `0.874010244842`.
- Alpha update L2 norm: `0.640222333842`.
- Beta update L2 norm: `0.640305714772`.
